title: TPMS Sensor Registration
symptoms: TPMS warning light on after tire rotation
TPMS sensors not registering after new sensor installation
Any wheel swap or tire swap
prerequisites: Correct TPMS sensors installed (433 MHz direct type for Toyota/Lexus)
All 4 tires properly inflated to spec
warnings: Toyota direct TPMS uses 433 MHz RF transmissions — sensors transmit when tire pressure changes
On real hardware each tire must be deflated ~5 PSI then re-inflated to trigger sensor RF transmission during learn mode
Sensor IDs are 32-bit values stored in TPMS ECU — must match physical sensor positions
After rotation, re-register in correct position order: FL → FR → RL → RR → Spare

steps.technical_detail: Read all 5 sensor ID DIDs (FL=0x1501, FR=0x1502, RL=0x1503, RR=0x1504, Spare=0x1505). Sensor IDs are 32-bit (4-byte) values returned bytes 3-6 of ReadDataByIdentifier response. Registered = sensor_id != 0 and sensor_id != 0xFFFFFFFF.
steps.caution: Document existing sensor IDs before re-registration in case rollback needed

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03 to TPMS ECU (0x730).
steps.caution: If rejected: verify ignition ON and TPMS ECU accessible

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0340. This puts TPMS ECU into 'learn mode'. ECU listens for RF transmissions from each sensor in order: FL → FR → RL → RR → Spare. On real vehicle: deflate each tire ~5 PSI then re-inflate to trigger sensor RF. Sensor IDs are automatically captured and stored to corresponding position DIDs.
steps.caution: On real hardware: must physically trigger each sensor in position order. Do not skip positions or ECU will associate wrong sensor ID to wrong position.

steps.technical_detail: Re-read all sensor ID DIDs to confirm new IDs stored. Check registered flag (sensor_id != 0 and sensor_id != 0xFFFFFFFF) for all 4 positions.
steps.caution: Any position still showing 0x00000000 or 0xFFFFFFFF = sensor not registered — repeat learn mode for that position

did_map.0x1501: TPMS Sensor ID — Front Left (u32 big-endian, 433 MHz sensor RF ID)
did_map.0x1502: TPMS Sensor ID — Front Right (u32 big-endian)
did_map.0x1503: TPMS Sensor ID — Rear Left (u32 big-endian)
did_map.0x1504: TPMS Sensor ID — Rear Right (u32 big-endian)

outcome_summary: Registers TPMS sensor 32-bit IDs to vehicle in correct position mapping (FL/FR/RL/RR/Spare). Resolves C2112 and C2115-C2118 codes after tire rotation or sensor replacement. Eliminates TPMS warning light.
